title: French Macaron Cake
description: A delicate and elegant French-inspired macaron cake, perfect for special occasions. With its crunchy shell and airy filling, this cake is sure to impress.
instructions: Prepare the almond flour and granulated sugar in a medium bowl.
In a separate bowl, whip the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Add the granulated sugar to the egg whites and continue whipping until stiff and glossy.
Gently fold the almond flour mixture into the egg mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a piping bag fitted with a round tip.
Pipe small circles of batter onto a parchment-lined baking sheet.
Tap the baking sheet gently to remove any air bubbles.
Allow the macarons to sit at room temperature for 30 minutes to an hour to form a skin.
Bake the macarons for 15-20 minutes, or until firm to the touch.
Allow the macarons to cool completely on a wire rack.
To assemble the cake, place a small amount of buttercream filling on one half of a macaron shell.
Top with another macaron shell to create a sandwich.
Repeat with the remaining macaron shells and filling.
Garnish with flaky sea salt and serve.
